modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Computer freezes on login screen in classroom.

full_description_text: The user reported that the OK button on the login screen was unresponsive. They were unable to proceed to the actual login page. This issue occurred on a classroom computer during an attempt to log in.
short_description: Computer freezes on login screen in classroom.
description: The user reported that the OK button on the login screen was unresponsive. They were unable to proceed to the actual login page. This issue occurred on a classroom computer during an attempt to log in.
